feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: HTTP Content Server all communication via SAP server?
entry.content:
Hi, 

we have a 3rd party ArchiveLink HTTP Content Server.

Create and Get request arrive at the HTTP Content Server from the end user client IP and not the SAP server IP

How can we configure SAP to have all communication going thru SAP server so the end user client doesn't need to communicate with the HTTP Content Server directly? (simpler firewall rules) 

We tried configure OAA3, OAG4,OAG1 and OAC0 but no luck. 
Please advise. 

OAC0 setting: 

Document Area: ArchiveLink
Storage type: HTTP Content Server

Document Area: ArchiveLink
Storage type: HTTP Content Server

entry.title: Purchase Requisition items not showing My Inbox Fiori
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

I'm implementing My Inbox after upgrading to SAP S4/HANA 2023.

I can't get the purchase requisitions items to appear in the app My Inbox 
I'm using Workflow WS20000077 with task TS20000159.

I implemented a note 3289039 - Missing item data in Purchase Requisition approval - SAP S/4HANA 2022 onward  and the following appears:

 

 

I maintain the settings before applying the note, and the header appears, but not the items.

 

I also followed the steps in this post.
Details of PR not showing on MY Fiori Inbox SAP S4/HANA 
Where I added and activated workflow WS20000077 in transaction SWETYPV.

And I checked task TS01800239 in SWFVISU

 

Thank you very much.
Regards,

entry.title: HU from EWM to ERP HU managed Sloc creates multiple record in VEKP and this lead to issues
entry.content:
HU is transfrerred from storage location managed in EWM to a storage location in ERP managed with HU and WM. in VEKP multiple records for same EXIDV are created. When GI is posted HU remains in status 0050 and when the HU is received in the HU managed storage location, a new record is created in VEKP. 

Standard transaction like LM18 reads the wrong record in VEKP

entry.title: HU not rehung to OD in ECC when ID is cancelled in EWM in a 2Step STO scenario
entry.content: We create with VLMOVE an outbound delivery in ECC from an HU-managed SLoc to a storage location in EWM (decentralized). For some reason we cancel the ID in EWM. The ID is cancelled in ECC as well but HU are not rehung to original OD

entry.title: Document Key (CA-DMS) definition - DIR and DRAW vs. KSSK-OBJEK
entry.content:
Hello,

How is the "Document Key" (CA-DMS) constructed ?

According to this old thread Unique Identifier from 2007, "Document Key" is apparently made by concatenating 4 values as per the following rule :

DOKAR (3 digits)
+ "modified DOKNR" (25 digits) ; a) if DOKNR is numerical, it is filled with 0's in front for a total of 25 numerical digits, or b) if DOKNR is text, space characters are added at the end to fill up to a total of 25 chars
+ DOKVR (2 digits)
+ DOKST (3 digits)


My questions :
1- Are the concatenation + front or back-filling of digits rules described above accurate and always valid ?
2- Where can I find the definition of the concatenation + digit filling rules in the official documentation from SAP ?
3- I need to do some external processing and link DIRs with Objects. I would like to read a table which has the "Document Key", DOKAR, DOKNR, DOKVR and DOKST . Does such a table exist ?

Thank you all in advance.

entry.title: Contract blocking error
entry.content:
The blocking error in the contract only occurs when there is a modification that affects the release strategy, and that causes the purchase document to be blocked (only in blocking, not release).
In this case, although internally the system "cleans" the fields that mirror the release strategy by changing the steps filled with an "X" and leaving them empty (""), externally, however, the code L (for released) does not change to B (for blocked), leading the user to believe that the document is still released, when in fact, the document is blocked.

Only by forcing a new lock does the document externally change the code L (released) to B (locked), therefore, we saw the need to open a ticket. We placed a document attached to the ticket, with images of two examples of purchasing documents that highlight the error for analysis. In this document, it is clear that internally SAP prepares the document for a new release, however, on the outside of the transaction, it remains as Released.

entry.title: login not possible on QAS system
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

we renewed the license ERS and ASCS, we are getting this license error "login not possible error in license check".

entry.title: SAP MM : Request information and how to used field in purchase requisition table
entry.content:
Need information for field EPREFDOC and EPREFITM in purchase requisition table (EBAN)

  • What is it used for?
  • How to display field in PR screen?
  • Is it possible to used as free field for user input some information?

entry.title: I cannot maintain Form routine field in IS-REA partner
entry.content: I cannot maintain Form routine field in IS-REA partner in J7LE. This field is not editable

entry.title: How to deactivate LO-LIS datasources?
entry.content:
How to deactivate 2LIS_* datasources using transaction LBWE?

entry.title: Combining of interpretation algorithm 001 with strings
entry.content:
I am trying to add string rules that search for account numbers and assign posting rules within interpretation algorithm 001 (OT83). However, the system does not seem to accept this configuration—it either routes the strings to the "adv" field or misinterprets customer numbers as vendor numbers.

Is there a way to configure this setup correctly so that the string rules work with algorithm 001 and correctly identify the customer accounts and posting rules?

Posting rule should work

It's posting for customer, but somehow the system reads it as vendor.

entry.title: 資産エクスプローラ機能の損失欄の値について
entry.content:
資産エクスプローラ機能で表示されている「損失」欄が、どのように計算されているか知りたい。

（テーブルデータのどの項目から計算されているのか）

資産エクスプローラは、ANLCのデータから表示していると理解しているが、「損失」欄をどのように計算されているのか分からず教えて頂きたい。

entry.title: Difference in VA05 output and BAPI_SALESORDER_GETLIST to get Open Orders Value
entry.content:
Hi Experts , 

when i ran VA05 report to get open orders for customer A , numbers of orders came 39 while running the FM BAPI_SALESORDER_GETLIST for same customer , it fetched 22 orders , i am not able to find the reasoning on it . my objectve is to find the open orders value basis on customer to prepare a FS for a Z report

Please help on this to build the logic

entry.title: Problema para exibir códigos de imposto (MWSKZ) na MIRO?
entry.content:
Recentemente, enfrentei um desafio curioso em um cliente. Após a criação de um novo código de imposto (IVA), percebi que ele simplesmente não aparecia na lista suspensa da transação MIRO. O mais intrigante? Não era só o novo código — outros IVAs já existentes também estavam invisíveis.

Começou então a clássica jornada investigativa: consultei documentações no SAP for Me, revisei todas as configurações standard recomendadas pela SAP (inclusive a Nota 2122460) e... nada. Tudo parecia estar em ordem. A dúvida persistia: por que apenas alguns códigos apareciam? Confesso que, até então, nunca tinha passado por isso em projetos anteriores — mas sempre há uma primeira vez.

Com apoio de um Expert ABAP, iniciamos o debug e — voilà! — encontramos a raiz do problema: um enhancement customizado no módulo de função HELP_VALUES_GET_WITH_TABLE.

Essa função é bastante utilizada nas versões anteriores ao S/4HANA para personalizar a ajuda de pesquisa — o famoso F4 Help.

A solução envolveu revisar esse enhancement e considerar a configuração sugerida na Nota 2122460, ou a substituição da função para F4IF_INT_TABLE_VALUE_REQUEST, já que a HELP_VALUES_GET_WITH_TABLE está obsoleta no S/4HANA.

Se você estiver enfrentando algo parecido, recomendo consultar as seguintes notas SAP:

  • 2122460 – MIRO/MIR4/MIR7: Códigos de imposto ausentes na lista suspensa
  • 3213274 – Substituição de HELP_VALUES_GET_WITH_TABLE

Abraços
Geziel R Cruz

entry.title: Problema ao acessar o Maintenance Planner
entry.content:
Estamos tentando acesso o Maintenance Planner pela url: https://support.sap.com/en/alm/solution-manager/processes-72/maintenance-planner.html , porém sem sucesso.

Existe algum problema?

entry.title: Test Automation Tool in post upgrade test
entry.content: Does TAT have reports on the results of all the test processes executed? If not, can integration with ALM provide the results automatically?

entry.title: test automation tool
entry.content: After allowing SAP to run post upgrade test automatically, do we still have to maintain variants for the system to run the tests. If so, what is the difference between manual execution and sap automation?

entry.title: Time Zone Change Impact on Timestamp Storage
entry.content:
Hello SAP Support Team,
We are planning to update all our Linux/Unix application servers by using UTC time zone instead of EDT/EST


  • If data was stored in the database while the servers were set to EDT/EST, how will this information be displayed or interpreted after the servers are switched to UTC?
  • When SAP stores timestamped information in the database, does it use the application server’s local time, UTC, or another standard?
  • Are there any additional considerations we should be aware of?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Request for guidance on certification, test environment, and API package for our SAP integration
entry.content:
We are a Build SAP Partner and would like to request your assistance regarding the next steps toward the certification of our integration with SAP, and the options available to us.
  • Background and Integration Details
Our product, has been integrated with SAP ERP (on-premise) through a set of custom ODATA services implemented in SAP . These services include:
  • ZMM_EMPACT_UOM – Unit of Measure (GET, POST)
  • ZMM_EMPACT_ADDRESS – Address (GET, POST)
  • ZMM_EMPACT_CC – Company Code (GET, POST)
  • ZMM_EMPACT_PLANTCC – Plant (GET, POST)
  • ZMM_EMPACT_MATERIAL – Material (GET, POST)
Using this integration, we successfully demonstrated a bidirectional inventory-related flow from our application into SAP and back. 
Our application has an inventory capability and manages part sets and part instances, and we have established the following logical mapping between SAP entities and product entities:

Product Entity Name
 
SAP Entity Name
 
Address
Address
Organization
Company Code
Site
Plant
Unit Of Measure
Unit Of Measure
Inventory Component Set and Inventory Component Instance
Material
 
These are then pushed into SAP via the custom ODATA services and also retrieved back into our system. If the user makes a change in SAP on those entities, we would like to have ingested the changes from SAP into our product. Right now, this is done by checking the data from SAP and comparing with the current data from AMMS and if there are changes in SAP, we then bring them in AMMS.
 
  • Certification Goal and Migration Need
As discussed previously with the SAP ICC team, we understand that on-premises SAP integrations are no longer eligible for certification, and we are now looking to:
  1. Adapt/migrate our integration to a cloud-compatible SAP technology
  2. Define the appropriate certification scenario
  3. Obtain access to a sandbox/test environment for integration testing
  4. Achieve certification of our bi-directional inventory integration
     
  • What We Have Explored
Prior to developing the custom ODATA services, we explored the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, where we found the SAP Returnable Packaging Management package with the following ODATA/V4 services:
  • Material General Data
  • Material Plant Data
  • Company Code
  • Address
  • Plant
  • Storage Location
  • Unit of Measure
  • Serial Numbers
These services seemed promising, and we noticed that some were even available with sandbox access using SAP ID-based authentication.
 
Would it be possible, following further discussions, to create a dedicated API package in SAP Business Accelerator Hub for our specific use case and integration flow?
Our desired scenario centers around inventory management capabilities, including material, location, unit of measure, and plant-level data.
Is SAP BTP the most suitable platform for this kind of integration and eventual certification? If not, what alternatives would SAP recommend?
Could we be provided access to a test/sandbox environment to develop and validate our new cloud-based integration before submitting it for certification?
 
We are fully committed to aligning our integration with SAP’s current cloud strategy and technical standards and would highly appreciate your guidance on the fastest and most effective path toward certification.
Looking forward to your recommendations.

entry.title: SAP Query - Issue with missing fields on Selection Screen (MEBANF)
entry.content:
We are facing an issue with missing fields on Selection Screen of SAP query MEBANF after regenerate the program from SQ01 (Query->More Functions->Generate Program) where as result some of the fields from selection screen are not been displayed anymore (e.g.: Plant).

Objects involed (all SAP standard)
Query: MEBANF  (User Group: /SAPQUERY/ME)
InfoSet: /SAPQUERY/MEBANF
Logical Datavase: BAM

We already executed the following actions:

1. SE36: Verify selection fields from BAM LDB used on below InfoSet;
2. SQ02: Infoset /SAPQUERY/MEBANF  ->  Generate InfoSet and also Adjust (InfoSet->More Functions->Adjust);
3. SQ01: Query MEBANF  ->  Verify selection fields and performed Adjust and Generate Program

All above objects were compared (all properties, tabs, definitions) with other system under same version and SAP starndard query looks all the same, except selection fields from auto generated report 'AQZZ/SAPQUERY/MEMEBANF========'.

As result per attached screen shots list of fields from development system is lower them list of fields from Q&A system.

Any other way to restore missing fields from selection screen generate by Query ?
